characters.name: Toad
characters.description: Posh, bombastic. Landed gentry. A ‘big’ character.

characters.name: Ensemble
characters.description: If not playing one of the 4 main characters, you will be cast in the ensemble. The amount of doubling/trebling etc depends on the size of the cast, but you will be playing a variety of roles both human and ‘animal’, including Otters, weasels, a horse, various woodland creatures, Jailer’s daughter, Barge-woman, various other humans and the God Pan!
